requirement_topic.en: ZESCO Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: ZESCO并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: ZESCO併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: ZESCO (Zambia Electricity Supply Corporation) sets out grid-connection technical requirements for PV inverters connecting to the national grid. Key requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within defined time limits; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) compliance, covering voltage and frequency operating ranges and protection relay settings; (3) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits; (4) inverter protection relay settings validated against Zambia's 50 Hz ±1 Hz, single-phase 230 V ±10%, three-phase 400 V ±10% grid parameters. Zambia's grid operates at 50 Hz / 230/400 V consistent with IEC standards. Inverter firmware and protection settings must be configured for Zambia grid conditions, not the 220/380 V parameters used in China under GB/T 156. For grid-tied installations, ERB licensing and ZESCO connection approval are statutory gates that must be obtained before energisation. CEC (Copperbelt Energy Corporation) serves the Copperbelt region and may apply equivalent or supplementary technical conditions for projects in its licence area.
summary.zh: ZESCO（赞比亚供电公司）规定了接入国家电网的光伏逆变器并网技术要求，主要包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在规定时限内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系统——公用接口特性）合规，涵盖电压和频率运行范围及保护继电器整定；（3）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值；（4）保护继电器整定须针对赞比亚50 Hz ±1 Hz、单相230 V ±10%、三相400 V ±10%电网参数进行验证。赞比亚电网按50 Hz / 230/400 V运行，与IEC标准一致。逆变器固件和保护整定须按赞比亚电网条件配置，而非中国依据GB/T 156使用的220/380 V参数。并网装置须在通电前取得ERB许可和ZESCO接入批准，这是法定门槛。CEC（铜带能源公司）服务铜带省，对其许可区域内的项目可能适用同等或补充技术条件。
summary.zht: ZESCO（尚比亞供電公司）規定了接入國家電網的光伏逆變器併網技術要求，主要包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在規定時限內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系統——公用介面特性）合規，涵蓋電壓和頻率運行範圍及保護繼電器整定；（3）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值；（4）保護繼電器整定須針對尚比亞50 Hz ±1 Hz、單相230 V ±10%、三相400 V ±10%電網參數進行驗證。尚比亞電網按50 Hz / 230/400 V運行，與IEC標準一致。逆變器韌體和保護整定須按尚比亞電網條件配置，而非中國依據GB/T 156使用的220/380 V參數。併網裝置須在通電前取得ERB許可和ZESCO接入批准，這是法定門檻。CEC（銅帶能源公司）服務銅帶省，對其許可區域內的項目可能適用同等或補充技術條件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
Energy Regulation Act (Zambia) — ERB licensing requirement for grid-tied generation
ZESCO network connection conditions — 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), GB/T 37408-2021, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and are not accepted as ZESCO or ERB grid-connection evidence. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's grid standard under GB/T 156 is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, whereas Zambia ZESCO specifies 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised for Zambia ZESCO grid conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2021及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件，不被ZESCO或ERB接受为并网证据。主要参数差异在于电压：中国电网标准依据GB/T 156为220/380 V 50 Hz，而赞比亚ZESCO规定为230/400 V 50 Hz。针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值须重新参数化为赞比亚ZESCO电网条件。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2021及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件，不被ZESCO或ERB接受為併網證據。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國電網標準依據GB/T 156為220/380 V 50 Hz，而尚比亞ZESCO規定為230/400 V 50 Hz。針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值須重新參數化為尚比亞ZESCO電網條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy ZESCO or ERB requirements for Zambia. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 compliance evidence covering Zambia voltage and frequency operating ranges; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays validated for Zambia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters. ERB licensing and ZESCO connection approval must be obtained before grid energisation. For projects in the Copperbelt, confirm CEC technical connection requirements in addition to ZESCO/ERB conditions. Zambia's load-shedding context means off-grid and mini-grid inverters may not require ZESCO grid-connection approval but still require ZABS product conformity and ERB project permits depending on scale.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足赞比亚ZESCO或ERB要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）涵盖赞比亚电压和频率运行范围的IEC 61727合规证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）针对赞比亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的固件保护阈值和重连延迟，而非中国220/380 V电网参数。并网前须取得ERB许可和ZESCO接入批准。铜带省项目须在ZESCO/ERB条件之外确认CEC技术接入要求。赞比亚停电背景意味着离网和微网逆变器可能不需要ZESCO并网批准，但视规模仍须满足ZABS产品合格评定及ERB项目许可要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足尚比亞ZESCO或ERB要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）涵蓋尚比亞電壓和頻率運行範圍的IEC 61727合規證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）針對尚比亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的韌體保護閾值和重連延遲，而非中國220/380 V電網參數。併網前須取得ERB許可和ZESCO接入批准。銅帶省項目須在ZESCO/ERB條件之外確認CEC技術接入要求。尚比亞停電背景意味著離網和微電網逆變器可能不需要ZESCO併網批准，但視規模仍須滿足ZABS產品合格評定及ERB項目許可要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-tied connection: ERB licensing (Energy Regulation Act) and ZESCO network connection approval are statutory requirements; IEC 62116 anti-islanding and 230/400 V parameter compliance are technical gates within ZESCO connection conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to ZESCO or ERB Zambia grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ZESCO grid-connection and ERB licensing require IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence — none of which is covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Zambia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. Verify current ZESCO connection conditions and ERB licensing requirements directly with ZESCO (zesco.co.zm) and ERB (erb.org.zm) before finalising the equipment compliance package. For projects in the Copperbelt region, also confirm CEC connection requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ZESCO并网和ERB许可要求IEC 62116、IEC 61727和IEC 61000-3-2证据——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为赞比亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向ZESCO（zesco.co.zm）和ERB（erb.org.zm）核实当前ZESCO接入条件及ERB许可要求。铜带省项目还须确认CEC接入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ZESCO併網和ERB許可要求IEC 62116、IEC 61727和IEC 61000-3-2證據——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為尚比亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向ZESCO（zesco.co.zm）和ERB（erb.org.zm）核實當前ZESCO接入條件及ERB許可要求。銅帶省項目還須確認CEC接入要求。

requirement_topic.en: ERB Licensing and ZABS Import Conformity — Statutory Gates for Grid-Tied PV in Zambia
requirement_topic.zh: ERB许可及ZABS进口合格评定——赞比亚并网光伏法定门槛
requirement_topic.zht: ERB許可及ZABS進口合格評定——尚比亞併網光伏法定門檻

summary.en: Grid-tied solar PV installations in Zambia require ERB (Energy Regulation Board) licensing under the Energy Regulation Act. The ERB issues generation licences for grid-tied systems above the small-scale threshold; smaller systems may be eligible for simplified registration. Equipment supplied to ERB-licensed projects must satisfy ERB technical conditions referencing IEC standards. Separately, ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) administers a conformity assessment regime for regulated imported products under ZS standards, many of which adopt IEC baselines. Exporters must verify whether their inverter model falls within ZABS's current mandatory certification product list and whether a Certificate of Conformity or pre-shipment inspection is required. GET FiT Zambia and Scaling Solar programme projects additionally impose project-level technical specifications that typically reference IEC standards and require evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 赞比亚并网太阳能光伏装置须依据《能源监管法》取得ERB（能源监管委员会）许可。ERB为超出小规模门槛的并网系统颁发发电许可证；较小系统可能符合简化登记要求。供应至ERB许可项目的设备须满足引用IEC标准的ERB技术条件。另外，ZABS（赞比亚标准局）依据ZS标准（大部分采纳IEC基准）对受监管进口产品实施合格评定制度。出口商须核实其逆变器型号是否属于ZABS现行强制认证产品清单，以及是否需要提交合格证书或装运前检查。GET FiT赞比亚及Scaling Solar计划项目还额外规定项目级技术规格，通常引用IEC标准，并要求提供来自ILAC认可实验室的证据。
summary.zht: 尚比亞併網太陽能光伏裝置須依據《能源監管法》取得ERB（能源監管委員會）許可。ERB為超出小規模門檻的併網系統頒發發電許可證；較小系統可能符合簡化登記要求。供應至ERB許可項目的設備須滿足引用IEC標準的ERB技術條件。另外，ZABS（尚比亞標準局）依據ZS標準（大部分採納IEC基準）對受監管進口產品實施合格評定制度。出口商須核實其逆變器型號是否屬於ZABS現行強制認證產品清單，以及是否需要提交合格證書或裝運前檢查。GET FiT尚比亞及Scaling Solar計畫項目還額外規定項目級技術規格，通常引用IEC標準，並要求提供來自ILAC認可實驗室的證據。

standards_or_laws: Energy Regulation Act (Zambia) — ERB licensing requirement for electricity generation
ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) — mandatory conformity assessment for regulated imported products under ZS standards
GET FiT Zambia programme — project-level IEC-referenced technical specifications
Scaling Solar programme (IFC / World Bank) — project-level procurement specifications

summary.en: China does not have a direct regulatory equivalent to Zambia's ERB licensing regime for PV generation. Grid-tied distributed solar in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) policies and grid operator connection rules referencing domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, GB/T 19964-2024). Chinese CQC/CGC voluntary certification based on GB/T standards does not satisfy ZABS mandatory conformity assessment obligations or ERB technical conditions. Exporters cannot rely on China domestic certificates to clear ZABS import conformity requirements — a separate ZABS conformity process must be undertaken if the product falls within ZABS's regulated product scope.
summary.zh: 中国没有与赞比亚ERB光伏发电许可制度直接等同的监管制度。中国并网分布式太阳能受国家能源局（NEA）政策及引用国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024）的电网运营商接入规则管理。基于GB/T标准的中国CQC/CGC自愿认证不满足ZABS强制合格评定义务或ERB技术条件。出口商不能依赖中国国内证书通过ZABS进口合格评定要求——若产品属于ZABS受监管产品范围，须单独进行ZABS合格评定程序。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與尚比亞ERB光伏發電許可制度直接等同的監管制度。中國併網分散式太陽能受國家能源局（NEA）政策及引用國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024）的電網運營商接入規則管理。基於GB/T標準的中國CQC/CGC自願認證不滿足ZABS強制合格評定義務或ERB技術條件。出口商不能依賴中國國內證書通過ZABS進口合格評定要求——若產品屬於ZABS受監管產品範圍，須單獨進行ZABS合格評定程序。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Zambia grid-tied projects face a two-track conformity requirement: (a) ZABS import conformity — verify whether the inverter falls within ZABS's mandatory certification product list; obtain a Certificate of Conformity if required before import; (b) ERB licensing — the project developer must hold an ERB generation licence and the equipment must satisfy ERB technical conditions. Chinese domestic PV approvals and certificates do not transfer to Zambia. For GET FiT Zambia and Scaling Solar projects, verify project-specific technical specifications with the project owner before committing product. Confirm current ZABS product scope and conformity process directly with ZABS (zabs.org.zm) and ERB licensing conditions with ERB (erb.org.zm).
gap.zh: 差距：用于赞比亚并网项目的中国逆变器面临双轨合格评定要求：（a）ZABS进口合格——核实逆变器是否属于ZABS强制认证产品清单；如须进口，需在进口前取得合格证书；（b）ERB许可——项目开发商须持有ERB发电许可证，设备须满足ERB技术条件。中国国内光伏审批和证书不能转移至赞比亚。GET FiT赞比亚和Scaling Solar项目须在确定产品前与项目业主核实项目特定技术规格。请直接向ZABS（zabs.org.zm）确认现行ZABS产品范围和合格评定程序，向ERB（erb.org.zm）确认ERB许可条件。
gap.zht: 差距：用於尚比亞併網項目的中國逆變器面臨雙軌合格評定要求：（a）ZABS進口合格——核實逆變器是否屬於ZABS強制認證產品清單；如須進口，需在進口前取得合格證書；（b）ERB許可——項目開發商須持有ERB發電許可證，設備須滿足ERB技術條件。中國國內光伏審批和證書不能轉移至尚比亞。GET FiT尚比亞和Scaling Solar項目須在確定產品前與項目業主核實項目特定技術規格。請直接向ZABS（zabs.org.zm）確認現行ZABS產品範圍和合格評定程序，向ERB（erb.org.zm）確認ERB許可條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: ERB generation licence is a statutory requirement under the Energy Regulation Act for grid-tied PV above the small-scale threshold; ZABS import conformity is mandatory for products within ZABS's regulated product scope
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic PV approvals are granted under NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Zambia ERB or ZABS requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ERB licensing and ZABS import conformity are independent statutory gates from any Chinese domestic PV approval. Confirm inverter model scope under ZABS mandatory certification and ERB technical conditions before shipment. Verify current ERB licensing thresholds, application requirements, and equipment technical conditions directly at erb.org.zm, and ZABS conformity product scope at zabs.org.zm.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ERB许可和ZABS进口合格评定是独立于任何中国国内光伏审批的法定门槛。出货前须确认逆变器型号是否属于ZABS强制认证范围及ERB技术条件。请直接在erb.org.zm核实当前ERB许可门槛、申请要求和设备技术条件，在zabs.org.zm核实ZABS合格评定产品范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ERB許可和ZABS進口合格評定是獨立於任何中國國內光伏審批的法定門檻。出貨前須確認逆變器型號是否屬於ZABS強制認證範圍及ERB技術條件。請直接在erb.org.zm核實當前ERB許可門檻、申請要求和設備技術條件，在zabs.org.zm核實ZABS合格評定產品範圍。
